title: hemigramma hollrungii
intro: Hemigramma hollrungii, also known as the Hollrung's creeping fern or Indonesian walking fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Indonesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hemigramma hollrungii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Hemigramma hollrungii are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant, which can be dried, powdered, or extracted into a tea or tincture for medicinal use.
